title: Gap Closure Check Artefact
description: Structured artefact documenting per-iteration gap closure for R10 band-3 evaluation under M6.3 codification. Addresses M7.2 (R10 band-3 closure-artefact tooling) surfaced at Cycle #7 close. Each instance records one iteration's closure evidence for the prior iteration's named gaps. Verifier must be independent of the iterator (self-attestation by the iterator inside the deliverable is insufficient per M6.3).

cycle_id.description: e.g. 'cycle-08'. Identifies which Meta-Audit cycle this artefact belongs to.

iteration_index.description: The iteration number being closed (must be >= 2; iteration 1 has no prior to close).

prior_iteration_report.description: Path to the evaluator/audit report from iteration-(N-1) that named the gaps being closed. e.g., 'attempts/attempt-01.eval-report-01.json'.

prior_iteration_path.description: Path to the iteration-(N-1) draft. e.g., 'attempts/attempt-01.md'.

current_iteration_path.description: Path to the iteration-N draft. e.g., 'attempts/attempt-02.md' or the final deliverable if N is terminal.

closures.description: One entry per disclosed gap closed in this iteration. Empty array is NOT valid (a gap-closure-check artefact with no closures documents nothing).

gap_id.description: Short identifier for the gap, e.g., 'G1' or 'hcv-03'.

gap_source.description: Exact path + JSON pointer or line reference where the gap was named. e.g., 'attempts/attempt-01.eval-report-01.json#/hard_constraint_violations/0'.

evidence_type.description: One of the three M6.3-recognised substitutes. 'subsequent-evaluator-report' = a later .eval-report-*.json from the evaluator. 'independent-oracle-output' = oracle/simulator/type-checker mechanical pass. 'committed-diff-verification' = external diff script output cited as artefact.

evidence_path.description: Path to the evidence file. Must be committed to the repo alongside this artefact.

closure_location.description: §-reference or byte range in current_iteration_path where the closure is realised. e.g., '§4.2, lines 120-155'.

non_inflation_note.description: Statement that this closure did not introduce a new gap of the same severity. Required when gap severity is high; optional otherwise.

verifier_identity.description: Who performed the verification. Must be an entity independent of the iterator: e.g., 'ROOT', 'proof-auditor', 'combinator-reducer.py', or a committed diff-check script. Self-attestation by the iterator (the deliverable's own front-matter) is NOT sufficient.

non_inflation_check.description: Per R10 non-inflation guard: iteration must not introduce new gaps of the same severity as those closed.

result.description: Outcome. If 'new-gaps-introduced', R10 band is capped per R10-iteration-depth.md.

new_gaps.description: If result='new-gaps-introduced', list them. Each should cite §-reference.
